cases.feature: CLI follow and App unfollow interaction
cases.preconditions: Remote endpoints are exactly https://awiki.info and wss://awiki.info/im/ws; isolated App and CLI identities pass canonical preflight.

cases.preconditions: Remote endpoints are exactly https://awiki.info and wss://awiki.info/im/ws; isolated App and CLI identities pass canonical preflight.
cases.action: Exercise the canonical relationship lifecycle through refreshes and repeated reads.

Refresh does not invent duplicate or stale relations.
negativeChecks: Any broadened state set, duplicate relation, or stale post-refresh state fails.

cases.preconditions: Flutter desktop and debug native IM Core artifacts are available.
cases.action: Provision one Storage Scope through the real App bootstrap, reopen the same native vault, then remove its key and retry openExisting.

negativeChecks: Native load failure, context/path mismatch, root replacement, or missing-key recreation fails the case.
